base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_5_lizard_first_quest — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 legend of zelda. Level 5 'Lizard' — Digdogger boss, Flute (Recorder)-item. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
